name: Cloudflare R2 Storage
description: Stores uploaded images in Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible object storage) instead of the local disk. Configure below, then activate to switch new uploads to R2.
author: Beyond Plus

settings.name: endpoint
settings.label: S3 API Endpoint
settings.help: Your R2 S3 API endpoint (no bucket).

settings.name: public_url
settings.label: Public Base URL
settings.help: Where objects are served publicly (R2 public bucket or custom domain).

settings.name: region
settings.label: Region
settings.help: R2 uses 'auto'; S3 uses e.g. ap-southeast-1.
